text: I feel rotten. Sudden high fever, severe body aches, dry hacking cough. 3 day(s) now, and I'm really worried because it's getting worse.
label: influenza/mild

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 8 day(s) in. My temperature is really elevated.
label: influenza/mild

text: Dangerously high fever, severe muscle pain, utterly exhausted. This has been 8 day(s), and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. I have a very high fever.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I know it's likely nothing but I haven't felt right and it's worrying me.
label: non-infectious

text: I've had a vague sense of fatigue, thought I'd get it checked out.
label: non-infectious
